title: Ultra Registry Registration Payload
description: Payload sent to POST /registry/register. Use oneOf to select the appropriate tier schema.

handle.description: Desired handle. Must be 3–30 lowercase alphanumeric characters or hyphens.

displayName.description: Human-readable display name for the agent (max 100 characters)

role.description: Functional role of this agent. Defaults to 'individual'.

lang.description: BCP-47 language tag for the agent's primary operating language

tier.description: Anonymous registration. No domain ownership required. Subject to strict rate limits.
Domain-verified registration. Requires a DNS TXT record on the supplied domain.

domain.description: Domain you control. A DNS TXT record ultra-verification=<token> must be added to confirm ownership.

organizationName.description: Legal or public name of the organization. Recommended when role is 'organization'.
